---
name: Validation — claim
about: Track or submit a validation of a specific claim in one of the papers
title: "[validation] <paper> § <section> <short description>"
labels: ["type:validation", "status:open"]
---

<!--
Thanks for engaging. This template is for tracking a specific claim in one of
the papers that needs validation, or for submitting a validation you have
performed. See CONTRIBUTING.md § 1 for acceptance criteria.
-->

## Claim

**Paper:** <!-- e.g., Paper 3: The Distinction Operation and the Generative Floor -->
**Version:** <!-- e.g., v9.1 -->
**Section:** <!-- e.g., § 4 -->
**Authoritative claim file:** <!-- e.g., validation/claims/music-kernel-03-terminal-coalgebra.md -->

**Claim statement (quote or restate precisely):**

> <!-- quoted claim here -->

## Domain(s)

<!--
Check all that apply. These determine which labels the issue gets.
-->

- [ ] Category theory
- [ ] Number theory
- [ ] Set theory / formal logic
- [ ] Mathematical analysis
- [ ] Physics
- [ ] Philosophy / philosophy of mathematics
- [ ] Musicology
- [ ] Other: ______

## What this issue asks for

<!--
One of:
- Please verify the argument as stated.
- Please advise whether [specific concern].
- Please flag any technical error in the cited theorem application.
- Please propose a cleaner statement if you find one.
-->

## Status

- [ ] Open (awaiting a validator)
- [ ] Under review
- [ ] Verified correct as stated
- [ ] Correction required (see linked PR or comment)
- [ ] Disputed (see thread)

## Validator(s) and response

<!--
If you are performing the validation, paste your written response here or link
to a PR that adds your name + response to validation/claims/<slug>.md.

If you are the author or maintainer, update this field as the issue progresses.
-->
